proof_rows_under_review: Targeted CLI tests prove codex1 setup writes only user-scope config.toml and hooks.json under temp CODEX_HOME/HOME.
Tests prove existing user files are backed up before mutation with manifest entries marked scope = user.
Tests prove setup is semantically idempotent when TOML/JSON are already desired.
Tests prove existing global setup backups can be restored through the CLI.
Relevant cargo test -p codex1 subset compiles and passes.
Targeted CLI tests prove `codex1 setup` writes only user-scope `config.toml` and `hooks.json` under temp CODEX_HOME/HOME.
Tests prove existing user files are backed up before mutation with manifest entries marked `scope = "user"`.
Tests prove setup is idempotent when the global surface is already desired.
Tests prove existing global setup backups can be restored or uninstalled through the CLI.
Tests assert no real home or unrelated repo files are mutated.
Relevant cargo test -p codex1 subset passes.
open_finding_summary: Prior review 29c04546 found semantic idempotence and global backup restore issues; both are repaired in package 7771db17.
